PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\theek\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\projects\\javascript\\visadapt-hoa\\server"; $env:DATABASE_URL="postgresql://communityhq:communityhq_secret@localhost:5432/communityhq_dev?schema=public"; npx tsx -e "import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'; const p = new PrismaClient\(\); const r = await p.user.count\({where:{role:'RESIDENT'}}\); const a = await p.user.count\({where:{role:'ADMIN'}}\); const b = await p.user.count\({where:{role:'BOARD_MEMBER'}}\); const v = await p.vendor.count\(\); const pr = await p.property.count\(\); console.log\('Residents:',r,'Admins:',a,'Board:',b,'Vendors:',v,'Properties:',pr\); const demos = await p.user.findMany\({where:{email:{in:['resident@communityhq.local','admin@communityhq.local','board@communityhq.local']}},select:{email:true,role:true}}\); demos.forEach\(d=>console.log\(d.email,d.role\)\); process.exit\(0\);" 2>&1)
